directoryNotFound: Events directory not found (404). Create it first: {{path}}
encryptionNote: Uses your cloud sync passphrase. Set up once; remains active across sessions.
encryptionEnabled: Encryption enabled. Passphrase not stored — not needed again on this device.
integrationNote: lifeGLANCE and dayGLANCE must point at the same WebDAV endpoint and events path. Milestones you mark "track as dayGLANCE Goal" will appear as goals in dayGLANCE; Goal completions and date changes sync back here.
toastGoalDeleted: dayGLANCE Goal deleted — "{{title}}" still exists here.
